title: AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY-SEVEN HUNDRED AND ONE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5403 / 58 OG No. 16, 3323 (April 16, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3302, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY-SEVEN HUNDRED AND ONE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Items (e) and (f) under Group III, for the Province of Cebu, page 193, paragraph (b), Section two of Republic Act Numbered Twenty-seven hundred and one are hereby amended to read as follows:

"(e) Tungkop Elementary School Building, Minglanilla Repair and remodelling

P8,000.00

"(f) Carcar Municipal Hall, Carcar Construction

10,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
